user.title: Set up Signal Lights
user.description: Create a Signal Lights instance to manage notification colors on your lights.

data.action: What would you like to do?

add_light.title: Add Light
add_light.description: Choose a light entity to use as a signal output.

remove_light.title: Remove Light
remove_light.description: Select a light to remove from signal outputs.

add_signal.title: Add Signal
add_signal.description: Define a new signal. Signals are prioritized by their position in the list.

trigger_entity_equals.title: Signal: {signal_name} — Entity equals state
trigger_entity_equals.description: Pick an entity and the state value to match.

data.light_filter: Only show on these lights (leave empty for all)

trigger_entity_on.title: Signal: {signal_name} — Entity is on
trigger_entity_on.description: Pick an entity that should be 'on' to activate this signal.

data.light_filter: Only show on these lights (leave empty for all)

trigger_numeric.title: Signal: {signal_name} — Numeric threshold
trigger_numeric.description: Pick a sensor entity and a numeric threshold.

data.light_filter: Only show on these lights (leave empty for all)

trigger_template.title: Signal: {signal_name}
trigger_template.description: Set the template for this {trigger_type} signal. The template should evaluate to true/false.

data.light_filter: Only show on these lights (leave empty for all)

reorder_signals.title: Reorder Signals
reorder_signals.description: Select a signal and its new position. Position 1 = highest priority.

configure_notifications.title: Configure Notifications
configure_notifications.description: Send notifications when signals are active. Currently {current_status}.

abort.no_lights: No lights configured yet. Add a light first.
abort.no_signals: No signals configured yet. Add a signal first.
abort.not_enough_signals: Need at least 2 signals to reorder.
